hypotheses.description: The parser call `data = json.loads(msg["content"])` at tests/test_qwen_agent.py:132 has no nearby exception handling, so malformed input may escape as an opaque failure.
hypotheses.falsification_test: Feed malformed input to the function containing line 132; a named boundary error or explicit rejection falsifies the hypothesis.

hypotheses.description: The dynamic command invocation `proc = subprocess.run(` at tests/test_redteam_nightly.py:107 may pass attacker-controlled arguments without an enclosing failure boundary.
hypotheses.falsification_test: Invoke this call with a harmless invalid executable and a shell metacharacter fixture; an explicit exception path with no command execution falsifies the hypothesis.

limitations: Hypotheses require module 3 verification; parser candidates may receive isolated induction, while unsupported families remain AST-only.
